mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 成功触发多条 toast 但无法完成 hover 展开测试。多次点击 Render a toast 按钮后仅看到单条 toast，toast 快速自动消失导致无法悬停到堆叠区域。41 步内反复尝试快速点击+立即 hover 均未成功触发展开效果。可能原因：toast 持续时间太短、堆叠区域坐标定位困难、或默认不展示堆叠效果。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The toast has auto-dismissed. mano-cua spent 41 steps trying to trigger multiple toasts and hover over the stacking area but could not successfully observe the expand functionality. Each toast auto-dismissed quickly (within seconds) before the mouse could reach the toast area to trigger expand.
